use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons with rich gradient styling in web applications
Color-coded action buttons for dashboards, forms, and navigation interfaces
Brand-themed buttons supporting 22 color variants with dark mode compatibility
ai_summary: Tom_ui Rich Button is an atomic button component featuring 22 gradient color variants with dark mode support and three size options (sm, default, lg). Built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility, it extends standard HTML button attributes while providing customizable gradient backgrounds with 85% opacity. Ideal for modern SaaS dashboards and web applications requiring visually rich interactive elements.
